creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
Anything more to do here? 

Thanks


(In reply to commit-hook from comment #16)

>     Relnotes:       yes

<https://www.freebsd.org/releases/13.1R/> release notes included: 

> NVMe iovec construction for large IOs in bhyve(8) has been fixed. The 
> problem was exposed by the UEFI driver included with Rocky Linux 8.4. 
> a7761d19dacd

(In reply to commit-hook from comment #17)

>     Relnotes:       yes

<https://www.freebsd.org/releases/12.3R/> release notes referred to FreeBSD-EN-21:25.bhyve, which referred to this bug 256422.
